summary: Iteration 13 testing complete. All 4 fixes verified: 1) Date parsing handles 'dd/mm/yy, h:mm PM' format with IST suffix, 2) Pie chart shows vendor-wise when All Vendors, role-wise when vendor selected, 3) Calendar uses full width (w-full class), 4) All data sheet-driven via Google Sheets sync.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 13 fixes verified. Date parsing handles 'dd/mm/yy, h:mm PM' format with IST suffix in both backend (normalize_interview_slot) and frontend (parseFlexDate/extractTime). Pie chart dynamically switches between vendor-wise (All Vendors) and role-wise (specific vendor). Calendar uses w-full for full width.
